name: Apricot Nectarine Cake by Charlotte
recipeIngredient: 1 package D.Hines Lemon Supreme cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix and sugar.
2. Add the apricot nectar and eggs to the dry ingredients. If using egg beaters, add them directly to the mixture.
3. Stir in the vegetable oil until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased Bundt pan.
5. Bake for 55 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Turn off the oven and let cool in the cake pan for 10-15 minutes before removing it from the pan.
